# Scene Authoring

Scenes are the central TreeSeed acceptance test harness and demo / educational video generator.

Commands: trsd scene status, trsd scene validate, trsd scene plan, trsd scene run, trsd scene inspect, trsd scene resume, trsd scene render, trsd scene training, trsd scene evidence, trsd scene publish, trsd scene publish-plan, trsd scene export, trsd scene visual-audit.

Actions: goto, click, fill, keyboard, pause, mailpitConfirmLatest, waitForOperation, apiRequest.

Expectations: visible, text, urlIncludes, operation.

Devices: desktop, tablet, mobile.

Motion uses renderer-portable keyframes. Visual object types support overlays and diagrams.

Use evidence, publish, and export outputs for review. Visual audit uses viewport screenshots.
